textPlain: /* «Error establishing a database connection». It always makes me sad when something that should be a static HTML document is rebuilt on every access from the database and whatnot, costing resources and feeling unwell under load. OK, I'll read it later, if I remember. */
Good article. The part about common SWR misconceptions and what actually happens in the feed line is a solid reminder that RF intuition is often wrong.
Be good if I could read it - anyone have a mirror?
